ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the college or university */,
  "conference_record" TEXT /* Record within the conference (e.g., 14-2) */,
  "overall_record" TEXT /* Overall win-loss record (e.g., 20-10) */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage calculated from overall record */,
  "current_streak" TEXT /* Current winning or losing streak (e.g., W12 for 12 wins in a row) */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference (e.g., East, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing in the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates if the game was home or away */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win, Loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team coached */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_type" TEXT /* Type of coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year in school (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose stats are recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the conference */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the conference commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the record */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins during the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses during the season */,
  "conference_champion" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team was conference champion */,
  "tournament_appearance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team appeared in a tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., View Team Stats, Edit Game Data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
